summary:
Fixed off-by-one error in processor.py.

Change made:
processor.py  
- end = start + batch_size - 1  
+ end = min(total, start + batch_size)   # slice end is exclusive

The slice end index must be exclusive; removing “-1” and bounding by total ensures every record is included and none are duplicated or dropped.

All tests in test.sh now pass:

PASS: All records processed correctly across batch boundaries
